pi_items.verified_value: Hydrogen Sulfide: 1.19 (HEAVIER); Ammonia: 0.5967 (LIGHTER); Chlorine: 2.49 (HEAVIER); Carbon Monoxide: 0.97 (SIMILAR); Sulfur Dioxide: 2.26 (HEAVIER)

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real chemical data from the live CAMEO Chemicals NOAA database. Web searches confirmed the official Vapor Density values: Hydrogen Sulfide is 1.19 (HEAVIER), Ammonia is ~0.60 (LIGHTER), Chlorine is 2.49 (HEAVIER), Carbon Monoxide is 0.97 (SIMILAR), and Sulfur Dioxide is 2.26 (HEAVIER). All of these real values fall exactly within the expected min/max tolerance ranges and classification logic defined in the task metadata.
